---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for DotShare Auth
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: kareem2099
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.

*Example: "I'm frustrated when tokens expire silently and the extension stops working without any feedback."*

---

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

---

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why you prefer your proposed solution.

---

## Platform Scope

Which platforms does this affect?

- [ ] LinkedIn
- [ ] X (Twitter)
- [ ] Facebook
- [ ] Reddit
- [ ] All platforms
- [ ] Not platform-specific

---

## Area

Which part of the codebase does this touch?

- [ ] Auth flow (`/auth/{platform}`)
- [ ] Callback flow (`/auth/{platform}/callback`)
- [ ] API routes (`/api/auth/*`)
- [ ] VS Code deep link
- [ ] UI / Design
- [ ] Token refresh / extension
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Deployment / Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation

---

## Implementation Notes

Optional: any technical details, links, or references that might help with implementation.

---

## Priority

How important is this to you?

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would improve my workflow significantly
- [ ] Blocking my use of DotShare Auth

---

> 📋 Check the [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) first — your idea might already be planned.
